inputs.prompt: sleek 3D illustration poster on a dark checkerboard background. On the left, a glossy 3D cyber-style control console with floating holographic screens, audio waveforms and color grading sliders, glowing light strips and neon accents, suggesting professional video and audio editing devices. On the right, a 3D studio setup with a camera, speakers and a small futuristic megaphone icon, plus a glowing white flower-shaped UI element. Cool bluish lighting mixed with warm highlights, glossy 3D shading, strong tech and multimedia vibes. At the top, small white text reads “Create & Play”. In the center, large rounded black Chinese title text reads “訊連科技”, with an English subtitle below in bold black capital letters: “CyberLink”. Under the title, three white bullet points with bilingual copy: “威力導演 – Pro Video Editing Studio”, “相片大師 – Creative Photo Editing Lab”, “Promeo – Instant Social Ad Creator”. Clean, modern layout, fun and professional branding poster with a high-tech audiovisual theme.
